spring-rest-sakila

A REST API service that provides CRUD and complex query operations on the Sakila sample database, a MySQL database modeling a DVD rental store company. The service exposes endpoints for managing core business entities including actors, films, customers, rentals, payments, staff, stores, and locations. It offers comprehensive API capabilities including role-based access control, JWT authentication, transactional support, caching via Redis, and detailed API documentation through OpenAPI/Swagger and REST Docs.

🕐 Generated July 12, 2026 at 04:55 AM UTC
Technology Stack: Spring Boot Web Spring Data JPA Spring HATEOAS Spring Security Spring REST Docs Spring Validation Spring Actuator Spring Data Redis MySQL Connector Lombok MapStruct QueryDSL Blaze-Persistence JJWT (JWT) Prometheus Kotlin Gradle
The application follows a layered architecture with clear separation of concerns: Controller layer (REST endpoints with role-based security), Service layer (business logic with transactional support), Repository layer (Spring Data JPA with custom QueryDSL/Blaze-Persistence queries), Entity layer (JPA-mapped domain objects), and DTO layer (data transfer objects with MapStruct mappers). Cross-cutting concerns are handled through filters (JWT authentication, MDC logging), configuration classes (Security, Redis, Persistence), and custom exception handling. The codebase is organized into distinct domain modules (actor, film, customer, rental, payment, staff, store, location, authentication) each with their own controllers, services, repositories, entities, and DTOs.
Domain Modules: Actor Management Film Management Customer Management Rental Management Payment Management Staff Management Store Management Location Management Authentication/Authorization Reporting

🧩 Design Patterns & Mapping 45
Uses Lombok annotations (@Getter, @Setter, @Builder, etc.) for boilerplate code generation; actual fields are not visible in the signature but are implied by the FieldNameConstants annotation. FullName — src/main/java/com/example/app/common/domain/dto/FullName.java
MapStruct mapper (componentModel=spring) for automatic implementation generation FullNameMapper — src/main/java/com/example/app/common/domain/mapper/FullNameMapper.java
Supports bidirectional mapping for flexible architecture patterns GenericMapper — src/main/java/com/example/app/common/domain/mapper/GenericMapper.java
Private no-args constructor enforces utility class pattern, preventing instantiation. ExpressionUtils — src/main/java/com/example/app/common/util/ExpressionUtils.java
Lombok-generated entity with @Builder pattern enabling fluent construction AuthorityEntity — src/main/java/com/example/app/services/auth/domain/entity/AuthorityEntity.java

Lifecycle hook via @PostConstruct ensures key setup occurs before token operations JwtTokenProvider — src/main/java/com/example/app/common/security/JwtTokenProvider.java

Uses @Relation annotation for Spring Data REST hypermedia support, mapping items to 'staff' and collections to 'staffList' StaffResponse — src/main/java/com/example/app/services/staff/domain/dto/StaffDto.java

Uses @Relation annotation for HATEOAS support with collection relation 'storeDetailsList' and item relation 'storeDetails' StoreDetailsResponse — src/main/java/com/example/app/services/store/domain/dto/StoreDetailsDto.java
Uses @Relation annotation for HATEOAS support with collection relation 'storeList' and item relation 'store' StoreResponse — src/main/java/com/example/app/services/store/domain/dto/StoreDto.java
Uses @Relation annotation to define HAL hypermedia relationships (collectionRelation=storeSalesList, itemRelation=storeSales) for REST API compatibility. StoreSalesResponse — src/main/java/com/example/app/services/store/domain/dto/StoreSalesDto.java
⚡ Caching & Performance 14
RedisCacheConfiguration method has elevated complexity (loc=18) suggesting custom serialization or TTL logic RedisConfig — src/main/java/com/example/app/config/RedisConfig.java
Employs Spring Data Pageable for efficient pagination in list and filtered queries. ActorController — src/main/java/com/example/app/services/catalog/controller/ActorController.java
Employs Spring Data Pageable for efficient pagination in list queries. FilmController — src/main/java/com/example/app/services/catalog/controller/FilmController.java
Multiple database indexes defined at the table level for performance optimization on title and foreign key columns FilmEntity — src/main/java/com/example/app/services/catalog/domain/entity/FilmEntity.java
Supports dynamic filtering and pagination through FilmDto and Pageable parameters CustomActorRepositoryImpl — src/main/java/com/example/app/services/catalog/repository/custom/CustomActorRepositoryImpl.java
Implements caching strategy with @Cacheable and @CacheEvict annotations for actor response data ActorServiceImpl — src/main/java/com/example/app/services/catalog/service/ActorServiceImpl.java
Implements caching strategy with @Cacheable and @CacheEvict annotations for film response data FilmServiceImpl — src/main/java/com/example/app/services/catalog/service/FilmServiceImpl.java
Multiple database indexes defined at the table level (store_id, address_id, authority_id, last_name) indicate performance-critical query patterns on these columns. CustomerEntity — src/main/java/com/example/app/services/customer/domain/entity/CustomerEntity.java
Database indexes configured on foreign key columns (staff_id, customer_id) for query performance optimization PaymentEntity — src/main/java/com/example/app/services/payment/domain/entity/PaymentEntity.java
Uses Spring Data's Pageable abstraction for pagination support in list operations RentalController — src/main/java/com/example/app/services/rental/controller/RentalController.java
Multiple database indexes defined for foreign key columns (inventory_id, customer_id, staff_id) to optimize query performance RentalEntity — src/main/java/com/example/app/services/rental/domain/entity/RentalEntity.java
Database indexes on film_id and composite (store_id, film_id) for performance optimization InventoryEntity — src/main/java/com/example/app/services/store/domain/entity/InventoryEntity.java
Database indexes on manager_staff_id (unique) and address_id for referential integrity and performance StoreEntity — src/main/java/com/example/app/services/store/domain/entity/StoreEntity.java
All methods use @Transactional(readOnly=true) annotation, optimizing performance for read-only queries and preventing accidental writes. ReportServiceImpl — src/main/java/com/example/app/services/store/service/ReportServiceImpl.java
✅ Validation & Null-Safety 13
Extends Jackson's StdSerializer to implement custom null-to-empty-string mapping NullToEmptyStringSerializer — src/main/java/com/example/app/common/domain/serializer/NullToEmptyStringSerializer.java
Useful for APIs that require consistent empty string representation instead of null for client compatibility NullToEmptyStringSerializer — src/main/java/com/example/app/common/domain/serializer/NullToEmptyStringSerializer.java
Methods are marked @NonNull, indicating strict nullability contracts for both input and output ActorDetailsRepresentationModelAssembler — src/main/java/com/example/app/services/catalog/assembler/ActorDetailsRepresentationModelAssembler.java

package com.example.app.services.auth.domain.vo
2 commits · last modified 2023-06-29
A Lombok-annotated value object that encapsulates user role information with generated getters and constructor support for required fields.
Uses Lombok annotations (@Getter and @RequiredArgsConstructor) for boilerplate reduction; all fields are implicitly immutable (final) and constructor-injected. Designed as a value object (vo package) with no explicit methods, suggesting role data is accessed exclusively through generated getters.

2 methods · 3 notable View details →
ActorMapper mapper
src/main/java/com/example/app/services/catalog/domain/mapper/ActorMapper.java
package com.example.app.services.catalog.domain.mapper
1 commit · last modified 2023-06-28
A MapStruct mapper that handles bidirectional conversion between ActorEntity and ActorDto domain objects, mapping actor identifiers and nested full name components.
Depends on: ActorDto ActorEntity GenericMapper
MethodDescription
ActorDto mapToDto(ActorEntity entity) Converts an ActorEntity to ActorDto by mapping actorId and nested fullName firstName/lastName fields.
ActorEntity mapToEntity(ActorDto dto) Converts an ActorDto to ActorEntity by mapping firstName and lastName fields to nested fullName components, ignoring actorId, and setting lastUpdate to the current LocalDateTime.
Uses MapStruct's @Mapping annotations to handle nested object mappings (fullName.firstName, fullName.lastName) Automatically sets lastUpdate field to current timestamp via expression during entity creation, ensuring audit trail tracking ActorId is ignored during DTO-to-entity conversion, preserving entity identity constraints
FilmMapper mapper
src/main/java/com/example/app/services/catalog/domain/mapper/FilmMapper.java
A MapStruct mapper that converts between FilmEntity and FilmDto, with deliberate exclusion of language relationship mappings.
2 methods · 3 notable View details →
FilmMapper mapper
src/main/java/com/example/app/services/catalog/domain/mapper/FilmMapper.java
package com.example.app.services.catalog.domain.mapper
1 commit · last modified 2023-06-28
A MapStruct mapper that converts between FilmEntity and FilmDto, with deliberate exclusion of language relationship mappings.
Depends on: FilmDto FilmEntity GenericMapper
MethodDescription
FilmDto mapToDto(FilmEntity entity) Converts a FilmEntity to FilmDto while ignoring languageByLanguageId and languageByOriginalLanguageId relationship fields.
FilmEntity mapToEntity(FilmDto dto) Converts a FilmDto to FilmEntity by ignoring filmId and language relationship fields, while automatically setting lastUpdate to the current LocalDateTime.
Intentionally ignores language relationship mappings (languageByLanguageId, languageByOriginalLanguageId), suggesting lazy loading or separate cascade handling for language references Automatically sets lastUpdate to current timestamp during entity creation for audit tracking filmId is ignored during DTO-to-entity conversion, preserving database-generated identifier semantics

package com.example.app.services.catalog.domain.serializer
2 commits · last modified 2023-07-05
A custom Jackson serializer for LocalDate objects that serializes dates as year-only values, extending LocalDateSerializer with configurable formatting and timestamp options.
MethodDescription
void LocalDateYearSerializer() Default no-argument constructor that initializes the serializer with default settings.
void LocalDateYearSerializer(LocalDateSerializer base, Boolean useTimestamp, DateTimeFormatter dtf, JsonFormat shape) Constructor that initializes the serializer with a base LocalDateSerializer and configuration parameters for timestamp formatting and shape.
void LocalDateYearSerializer(DateTimeFormatter formatter) Constructor that initializes the serializer with a custom DateTimeFormatter for year-based date formatting.
LocalDateYearSerializer withFormat(Boolean useTimestamp, DateTimeFormatter dtf, JsonFormat shape) Description unavailable.
void serialize(LocalDate date, JsonGenerator gen, SerializerProvider provider) Description unavailable.
void serializeWithType(LocalDate value, JsonGenerator gen, SerializerProvider provider, TypeSerializer typeSer) Description unavailable.
void _serializeAsArrayContents(LocalDate value, JsonGenerator gen, SerializerProvider provider) Helper method that serializes a LocalDate as array contents in the year-only format.
Custom Jackson serializer extending LocalDateSerializer for year-only date serialization Cyclomatic complexity of 3 in serialize() and serializeWithType() methods suggests conditional branching for multiple output format cases

CustomActorRepository repository
src/main/java/com/example/app/services/catalog/repository/custom/CustomActorRepository.java
package com.example.app.services.catalog.repository.custom
2 commits · last modified 2023-07-05
Interface defining custom query operations for Actor entities, including retrieval of actor details, film associations, and modification of actor-film relationships.
Depends on: ActorDetailsDto FilmDetailsDto FilmDto
MethodDescription
List findAllActorDetailsList() Retrieves a complete list of all actors with their detailed information.
Optional findActorDetailsById(Integer actorId) Retrieves detailed information for a specific actor identified by their ID.
List findAllActorFilmListByIdWithCondition(Integer actorId, FilmDto condition, Pageable pageable) Retrieves a paginated list of films associated with a specific actor, filtered by the provided film condition criteria.
Optional findActorFilmById(Integer actorId, Integer filmId) Retrieves a specific film record linked to an actor by their respective IDs.
Optional findActorFilmDetailsById(Integer actorId, Integer filmId) Retrieves detailed information about a specific film associated with a particular actor.
Optional addActorFilm(Integer actorId, Integer filmId) Creates a new association between an actor and a film, returning the created relationship.
void removeActorFilm(Integer actorId, Integer filmId) Removes the association between an actor and a film.
CustomActorRepositoryImpl repository
src/main/java/com/example/app/services/catalog/repository/custom/CustomActorRepositoryImpl.java
Implementation of CustomActorRepository providing concrete database query operations for actor and actor-film data using Blaze-Persistence and JPA Query.

src/main/java/com/example/app/services/catalog/repository/custom/CustomActorRepositoryImpl.java
package com.example.app.services.catalog.repository.custom
3 commits · last modified 2023-07-09
Implementation of CustomActorRepository providing concrete database query operations for actor and actor-film data using Blaze-Persistence and JPA Query.
Depends on: ActorDetailsDto FilmDetailsDto FilmDto
MethodDescription
List findAllActorDetailsList() Description unavailable.
Optional findActorDetailsById(Integer actorId) Description unavailable.
BlazeJPAQuery findActorDetail(Integer id) Builds and returns a Blaze-Persistence JPA query object for retrieving detailed actor information filtered by ID.
List findAllActorFilmListByIdWithCondition(Integer actorId, FilmDto condition, Pageable pageable) Description unavailable.
Optional findActorFilmById(Integer actorId, Integer filmId) Description unavailable.
JPAQuery findActorFilm(Integer actorId, Integer filmId, FilmDto condition, Pageable pageable) Builds and returns a JPA query object for retrieving actor-film associations with optional filtering and pagination.
Optional findActorFilmDetailsById(Integer actorId, Integer filmId) Description unavailable.
Optional addActorFilm(Integer actorId, Integer filmId) Description unavailable.
void removeActorFilm(Integer actorId, Integer filmId) Description unavailable.
Uses Blaze-Persistence for optimized JPA queries beyond standard Spring Data JPA capabilities Implements query builder pattern with separate helper methods (findActorDetail, findActorFilm) to construct reusable query objects Supports dynamic filtering and pagination through FilmDto and Pageable parameters

CustomFilmRepository repository
src/main/java/com/example/app/services/catalog/repository/custom/CustomFilmRepository.java
package com.example.app.services.catalog.repository.custom
2 commits · last modified 2023-07-05
Interface defining custom repository operations for film entities, providing contracts for querying films, actors, and associated details with pagination and filtering support.
Depends on: ActorDto FilmDetailsDto FilmDto
MethodDescription
List findAllFilmList(Pageable pageable) Retrieves a paginated list of all films.
List findAllFilmListWithFilter(FilmDto condition, Pageable pageable) Retrieves a paginated list of films filtered by the given FilmDto condition.
List findAllFilmActorListById(Integer filmId, Pageable pageable) Retrieves a paginated list of actors associated with a specific film.
Optional findFilmActorById(Integer filmId, Integer actorId) Retrieves a specific actor in a given film, returning an Optional result.
List findAllFilmListDetail() Retrieves a complete list of all films with detailed information.
Optional findFilmDetailsById(Integer filmId) Retrieves detailed information about a specific film, returning an Optional result.

List findAllFilmList(Pageable pageable) Description unavailable.

JPAQuery findFilmActor(Integer filmId, Integer actorId, Pageable pageable) Constructs and returns a JPA query for retrieving specific film-actor relationships with optional pagination.
List findAllFilmListDetail() Description unavailable.
Optional findFilmDetailsById(Integer filmId) Description unavailable.
BlazeJPAQuery findFilmDetail(Integer id) Constructs and returns a Blaze JPA query for retrieving comprehensive details of a specific film.
Uses both JPAQuery and BlazeJPAQuery for different query scenarios, indicating potential optimization for complex detail queries Implements custom query methods rather than relying solely on Spring Data derived query methods, providing fine-grained control over database access patterns

ActorService service
src/main/java/com/example/app/services/catalog/service/ActorService.java
package com.example.app.services.catalog.service
2 commits · last modified 2023-07-05
Interface defining the contract for actor-related business operations, including retrieval, search, creation, modification, and deletion of actors and their associated films.
Depends on: ActorDetailsDto ActorDto FilmDetailsDto FilmDto
MethodDescription
List getActorList(Pageable pageable) Retrieves a paginated list of all actors.
Optional getActor(Integer actorId) Retrieves an actor by its unique identifier.
List getActorDetailsList() Retrieves a complete list of all actors with detailed information.
Optional getActorDetails(Integer actorId) Retrieves detailed information for a specific actor by its identifier.
List getActorFilmList(Integer actorId, FilmDto condition, Pageable pageable) Retrieves a paginated list of films associated with a specific actor, filtered by optional conditions.
Optional getActorFilm(Integer actorId, Integer filmId) Retrieves a specific film associated with an actor.
Optional getActorFilmDetails(Integer actorId, Integer filmId) Retrieves detailed information about a film in the context of a specific actor.
List searchActorList(String name) Searches for actors by name.
ActorDto addActor(ActorDto model) Creates a new actor with the provided data and returns the created actor.
FilmDto addActorFilm(Integer actorId, Integer filmId) Associates an existing film with an actor and returns the film information.
ActorDto updateActor(Integer actorId, ActorDto model) Updates an existing actor with the provided data and returns the updated actor.
void deleteActor(Integer actorId) Deletes an actor by its identifier.
void removeActorFilm(Integer actorId, Integer filmId) Removes the association between an actor and a film.

Implements caching strategy with @Cacheable and @CacheEvict annotations for actor response data All read operations are marked with readOnly=true for optimization Modification operations (add, update, delete) use non-readonly transactions

List getFilmList() Retrieves a complete list of all films.
List getFilmList(FilmDto condition, Pageable pageable) Retrieves a paginated list of films filtered by optional conditions.
Optional getFilm(Integer filmId) Retrieves a film by its unique identifier.
List getFilmActorList(Integer filmId, Pageable pageable) Retrieves a paginated list of actors associated with a specific film.

void deleteFilm(Integer filmId) Deletes a film by its identifier.

CustomerController controller
src/main/java/com/example/app/services/customer/controller/CustomerController.java
REST controller for managing customer resources, providing endpoints to retrieve, create, update, and delete customers, as well as access customer-related details, payments, and rental information.
GET /customers POST /customers GET /customers/{customerId} PUT /customers/{customerId} +4 more
8 methods · 3 notable View details →
CustomerController controller
src/main/java/com/example/app/services/customer/controller/CustomerController.java
package com.example.app.services.customer.controller
1 commit · last modified 2023-06-28
REST controller for managing customer resources, providing endpoints to retrieve, create, update, and delete customers, as well as access customer-related details, payments, and rental information.
GET /customers POST /customers GET /customers/{customerId} PUT /customers/{customerId} DELETE /customers/{customerId} GET /customers/{customerId}/details GET /customers/{customerId}/payments GET /customers/{customerId}/rentals
Depends on: CustomerDetailsDto CustomerDetailsRepresentationModelAssembler CustomerDto CustomerRepresentationModelAssembler CustomerService PaymentDto PaymentRepresentationModelAssembler RentalDto RentalRepresentationModelAssembler RentalStatus UserRole
MethodDescription
ResponseEntity getCustomerList(Pageable pageable) Retrieves a paginated list of all customers, restricted to users with the ROLE_MANAGE authority.
ResponseEntity addCustomer(CustomerDto model) Creates a new customer with the provided customer data, restricted to users with the ROLE_MANAGE authority.
ResponseEntity getCustomer(Integer customerId) Retrieves a single customer by their ID, restricted to users with the ROLE_MANAGE authority.
ResponseEntity updateCustomer(Integer customerId, CustomerDto model) Updates an existing customer's information with the provided data, restricted to users with the ROLE_MANAGE authority.
ResponseEntity deleteCustomer(Integer customerId) Deletes a customer by their ID, restricted to users with the ROLE_MANAGE authority.
ResponseEntity getCustomerDetails(Integer customerId) Retrieves detailed information for a specific customer, restricted to users with the ROLE_MANAGE authority.
ResponseEntity getCustomerPaymentList(Integer customerId, String startDate, String endDate) Retrieves payment records for a specific customer filtered by an optional date range, restricted to users with the ROLE_MANAGE authority.
ResponseEntity getCustomerRentalList(Integer customerId, String status, String startDate, String endDate) Retrieves rental records for a specific customer filtered by optional status and date range parameters, restricted to users with the ROLE_MANAGE authority.
All endpoints are secured with @Secured(UserRole.Constants.ROLE_MANAGE), enforcing role-based access control for customer management operations Uses @RequiredArgsConstructor indicating dependency injection of required services through constructor parameters Implements standard REST conventions with GetMapping, PostMapping, PutMapping, and DeleteMapping for CRUD operations

Complex equals() method with cyclomatic complexity of 11, suggesting intricate equality logic that may warrant review for maintainability. Entity uses Lombok annotations (@Getter, @Builder, @AllArgsConstructor, @NoArgsConstructor) for code generation, reducing boilerplate but hiding actual implementation details. Multiple database indexes defined at the table level (store_id, address_id, authority_id, last_name) indicate performance-critical query patterns on these columns.

2 methods · 4 notable View details →
CustomerMapper mapper
src/main/java/com/example/app/services/customer/domain/mapper/CustomerMapper.java
package com.example.app.services.customer.domain.mapper
1 commit · last modified 2023-06-28
A MapStruct mapper for converting between CustomerEntity and CustomerDto, selectively ignoring generated/managed fields and mapping nested properties with timestamp expressions.
Depends on: CustomerDto CustomerEntity GenericMapper
MethodDescription
CustomerDto mapToDto(CustomerEntity entity) Converts a CustomerEntity to a CustomerDto, ignoring entity references (store, address, authority) that should not be included in the DTO projection.
CustomerEntity mapToEntity(CustomerDto dto) Converts a CustomerDto back to a CustomerEntity, mapping first and last name fields into a nested fullName object and setting lastUpdate to the current timestamp while ignoring ID and entity references.
MapStruct mapper with Spring component model for dependency injection Uses custom expression 'java(LocalDateTime.now())' to set lastUpdate timestamp during entity mapping Maps nested object properties (fullName.firstName, fullName.lastName) from flat DTO properties Systematically ignores managed/generated relationships (storeByStoreId, addressByAddressId, authorityByAuthorityId) to prevent unintended data manipulation

List findAllCustomerDetailsList() Retrieves a list of all customer details.
Optional findCustomerDetailsById(Integer customerId) Retrieves customer details by their ID, returning an Optional to handle cases where the customer may not exist.
List findAllCustomerPaymentListByIdWithCondition(Integer customerId, LocalDate startDate, LocalDate endDate) Retrieves all payment records for a specific customer within a date range.
List findAllCustomerRentalListByIdWithCondition(Integer customerId, RentalStatus status, LocalDate startDate, LocalDate endDate) Retrieves all rental records for a specific customer filtered by status and date range.

List findAllCustomerDetailsList() Description unavailable.

List findAllCustomerRentalListByIdWithCondition(Integer customerId, RentalStatus status, LocalDate startDate, LocalDate endDate) Description unavailable.
Uses QueryDSL (JPAQuery) for type-safe, complex dynamic queries rather than relying solely on Spring Data JPA derived query methods The @RequiredArgsConstructor annotation suggests dependency injection of QueryDSL components, likely EntityManager or QueryFactory

Service class uses @RequiredArgsConstructor for dependency injection, indicating constructor-based injection of repositories or other dependencies. All read operations are marked with @Transactional(readOnly=true) for optimized transaction handling and potential database hint propagation. Write operations (add, update, delete) use default @Transactional without readOnly flag to ensure proper transaction semantics for data modifications.

LocationController controller
src/main/java/com/example/app/services/location/controller/LocationController.java
REST controller that provides HTTP endpoints for managing location data, including addresses and cities, with role-based access control.
GET /location/addresses POST /location/addresses GET /location/addresses/{addressId} PUT /location/addresses/{addressId} +7 more
11 methods · 3 notable View details →
LocationController controller
src/main/java/com/example/app/services/location/controller/LocationController.java
package com.example.app.services.location.controller
1 commit · last modified 2023-06-28
REST controller that provides HTTP endpoints for managing location data, including addresses and cities, with role-based access control.
GET /location/addresses POST /location/addresses GET /location/addresses/{addressId} PUT /location/addresses/{addressId} DELETE /location/addresses/{addressId} GET /location/addresses/{addressId}/details GET /location/cities POST /location/cities GET /location/cities/{cityId} PUT /location/cities/{cityId} DELETE /location/cities/{cityId}
Depends on: AddressDto AddressRepresentationModelAssembler CityDto CityRepresentationModelAssembler LocationService UserRole
MethodDescription
ResponseEntity getAddressList(Pageable pageable) Retrieves a paginated list of all addresses, accessible to users with read permissions.
ResponseEntity addAddress(AddressDto model) Creates a new address from the provided data transfer object, restricted to users with manage permissions.
ResponseEntity getAddress(Integer addressId) Retrieves a single address by its ID, accessible to users with read permissions.
ResponseEntity updateAddress(Integer addressId, AddressDto model) Updates an existing address with new data, restricted to users with manage permissions.
ResponseEntity deleteAddress(Integer addressId) Deletes an address by its ID, restricted to users with manage permissions.
ResponseEntity getAddressDetails(Integer addressId) Retrieves detailed information about a specific address, accessible to users with read permissions.
ResponseEntity getCityList(Pageable pageable) Retrieves a paginated list of all cities, accessible to users with read permissions.
ResponseEntity addCity(CityDto model) Creates a new city from the provided data transfer object, restricted to users with manage permissions.
ResponseEntity getCity(Integer cityId) Retrieves a single city by its ID, accessible to users with read permissions.
ResponseEntity updateCity(Integer cityId, CityDto model) Updates an existing city with new data, restricted to users with manage permissions.
ResponseEntity deleteCity(Integer cityId) Deletes a city by its ID, restricted to users with manage permissions.
All endpoints are protected with @Secured annotation enforcing role-based access control (ROLE_READ for queries, ROLE_MANAGE for mutations). Follows RESTful CRUD conventions with separate endpoints for addresses and cities under /location/{resource} paths. Uses @RequiredArgsConstructor indicating dependency injection of collaborating services via constructor.

AddressMapper mapper
src/main/java/com/example/app/services/location/domain/mapper/AddressMapper.java
package com.example.app.services.location.domain.mapper
1 commit · last modified 2023-06-28
MapStruct mapper for bidirectional conversion between AddressEntity and AddressDto, with automatic timestamp management and relationship ignoring.
Depends on: AddressDto AddressEntity GenericMapper
MethodDescription
AddressDto mapToDto(AddressEntity entity) Description unavailable.
AddressEntity mapToEntity(AddressDto dto) Description unavailable.
Uses @Mapping with expression=java(LocalDateTime.now()) to automatically set lastUpdate timestamp on entity creation, ensuring audit trail consistency. Ignores nested relationships (cityByCityId) to prevent circular mappings and lazy loading issues. Both mapToEntity and mapToDto ignore generated/relationship fields, following a common pattern for bidirectional DTOs.

CityMapper mapper
src/main/java/com/example/app/services/location/domain/mapper/CityMapper.java
package com.example.app.services.location.domain.mapper
1 commit · last modified 2023-06-28
MapStruct mapper for converting CityDto to CityEntity with automatic timestamp management and relationship ignoring.
Depends on: CityDto CityEntity GenericMapper
MethodDescription
CityEntity mapToEntity(CityDto dto) Description unavailable.
Uses @Mapping with expression=java(LocalDateTime.now()) to automatically set lastUpdate timestamp on entity creation, providing consistent audit trail behavior. Ignores generated primary key (cityId) and nested relationship (countryByCountryId) to avoid overwrites and circular mapping issues. Only provides mapToEntity mapping; reverse mapToDto mapping is absent, suggesting CityDto may not be the primary output format or is handled elsewhere.

src/main/java/com/example/app/common/domain/mapper/GenericMapper.java
package com.example.app.common.domain.mapper
2 commits · last modified 2023-06-25
Generic mapper interface providing bidirectional transformation between domain entities and their DTO representations, with support for single objects and collections.
MethodDescription
U mapToDto(T entity) Transforms a single domain entity into its corresponding DTO representation.
T mapToEntity(U dto) Transforms a single DTO into its corresponding domain entity representation.
List mapToDtoList(List entityList) Converts a list of domain entities into a list of their DTO representations.
List mapToDtoList(Page pageEntityList) Converts a paginated result of domain entities into a list of their DTO representations.
List mapToEntityList(List dtoList) Converts a list of DTOs into a list of their corresponding domain entity representations.
Generic interface supporting type-safe entity-DTO conversions with bounded type parameters Provides overloaded collection methods handling both raw lists and paginated results Supports bidirectional mapping for flexible architecture patterns

package com.example.app.services.payment.controller
1 commit · last modified 2023-06-28
A REST controller that handles HTTP requests for payment management operations, providing endpoints to list, retrieve, update, delete, and view details of payments with role-based access control.
GET /payments GET /payments/{paymentId} PUT /payments/{paymentId} DELETE /payments/{paymentId} GET /payments/{paymentId}/details
Depends on: PaymentDto PaymentRepresentationModelAssembler PaymentService UserRole
MethodDescription

ResponseEntity deletePayment(Integer paymentId) Description unavailable.
ResponseEntity getPaymentDetails(Integer paymentId) Description unavailable.
All endpoints are secured with @Secured(UserRole.Constants.ROLE_MANAGE), enforcing role-based access control to restrict payment operations to authorized management users. Uses dependency injection via @RequiredArgsConstructor, indicating fields are injected through constructor parameters.

Builder pattern and Lombok annotations provide concise DTO construction and serialization support.

package com.example.app.services.payment.domain.mapper
1 commit · last modified 2023-06-28
A MapStruct mapper that converts PaymentDto objects to PaymentEntity objects, with custom handling for ID generation, timestamps, and relationship assignments.
Depends on: GenericMapper PaymentDto PaymentEntity
MethodDescription
PaymentEntity mapToEntity(PaymentDto dto) Maps a PaymentDto to a PaymentEntity, ignoring the paymentId field (allowing auto-generation), setting lastUpdate to the current LocalDateTime, and ignoring customer, staff, and rental relationship mappings for explicit assignment elsewhere.
Uses MapStruct @Mapper with spring componentModel for dependency injection Imports LocalDateTime for use in mapping expressions Explicitly ignores foreign key relationships (customerByCustomerId, staffByStaffId, rentalByRentalId) to prevent unintended mapping Uses expression-based mapping to populate lastUpdate with LocalDateTime.now() for audit trail purposes

6 methods · 3 notable View details →
RentalController controller
src/main/java/com/example/app/services/rental/controller/RentalController.java
package com.example.app.services.rental.controller
1 commit · last modified 2023-06-28
REST controller managing rental operations for DVDs, providing endpoints for CRUD operations and rental state management with role-based access control.
GET /rentals POST /rentals GET /rentals/{rentalId} PUT /rentals/{rentalId} DELETE /rentals/{rentalId} PUT /rentals/return
Depends on: RentalDto RentalRepresentationModelAssembler RentalService UserRole
MethodDescription
ResponseEntity getRentalList(Pageable pageable) Retrieves a paginated list of all rentals, accessible only to users with ROLE_MANAGE.
ResponseEntity rentDvd(RentalDto model) Creates a new DVD rental record from the provided rental data transfer object, requiring ROLE_MANAGE access.
ResponseEntity getRental(Integer rentalId) Fetches a single rental by its unique identifier, restricted to ROLE_MANAGE users.
ResponseEntity updateRental(Integer rentalId, RentalDto model) Updates an existing rental record with new data, accessible only to users with ROLE_MANAGE.
ResponseEntity deleteRental(Integer rentalId) Deletes a rental record by its identifier, requiring ROLE_MANAGE authorization.
ResponseEntity returnDvd(Map input) Processes the return of a rented DVD using input parameters provided in a map, restricted to ROLE_MANAGE users.
All endpoints are secured with @Secured(UserRole.Constants.ROLE_MANAGE), enforcing role-based access control Uses Spring Data's Pageable abstraction for pagination support in list operations returnDvd endpoint accepts untyped Map parameter, which reduces type safety and may obscure required input structure

RentalMapper mapper
src/main/java/com/example/app/services/rental/domain/mapper/RentalMapper.java
package com.example.app.services.rental.domain.mapper
1 commit · last modified 2023-06-28
A MapStruct mapper for converting between RentalEntity and RentalDto, with Spring component integration. It provides multiple mapping strategies for different use cases including full entity mapping and rental-specific entity mapping.
Depends on: GenericMapper RentalDto RentalEntity
MethodDescription
RentalDto mapToDto(RentalEntity entity) Description unavailable.
RentalEntity mapToEntity(RentalDto dto) Description unavailable.
RentalEntity mapToEntity(RentalDto dto) Description unavailable.
RentalEntity mapToRentEntity(RentalDto dto) Description unavailable.
List mapToEntityList(List dtoList) Description unavailable.
Implements multiple overloaded mapping methods to handle different scenarios: standard entity conversion, rental-specific entity creation with return date ignored, and bulk list mapping. Uses ignore=true on foreign key relationship targets (inventoryByInventoryId, customerByCustomerId, staffByStaffId) to prevent lazy-loading side effects and circular dependencies. Employs expression=java(LocalDateTime.now()) for automatic timestamp management, ensuring lastUpdate is always set to the current time during entity creation. The custom @DoMapping qualifier on the list mapping method suggests selective application of mapping logic based on a custom annotation, enabling variant mapping strategies within the same mapper.

Extends Jackson's StdSerializer to implement custom null-to-empty-string mapping Implements all major serialization contract methods for complete Jackson integration Useful for APIs that require consistent empty string representation instead of null for client compatibility

StaffController controller
src/main/java/com/example/app/services/staff/controller/StaffController.java
package com.example.app.services.staff.controller
1 commit · last modified 2023-06-28
REST controller that exposes endpoints for managing staff records, including retrieval, creation, update, and deletion operations with role-based access control.
GET /staffs POST /staffs GET /staffs/{staffId} PUT /staffs/{staffId} DELETE /staffs/{staffId} GET /staffs/{staffId}/details
Depends on: StaffDetailsDto StaffDetailsRepresentationModelAssembler StaffDto StaffRepresentationModelAssembler StaffService UserRole
MethodDescription
ResponseEntity getStaffList(Pageable pageable) Retrieves a paginated list of all staff members, accessible only to users with ROLE_MANAGE.
ResponseEntity addStaff(StaffDto model) Creates a new staff record from the provided StaffDto, restricted to users with ROLE_ADMIN.
ResponseEntity getStaff(Integer staffId) Retrieves a single staff member by ID, accessible only to users with ROLE_MANAGE.
ResponseEntity updateStaff(Integer staffId, StaffDto model) Updates an existing staff record identified by staffId with data from the provided StaffDto, restricted to users with ROLE_ADMIN.
ResponseEntity deleteStaff(Integer staffId) Deletes a staff record by ID, restricted to users with ROLE_ADMIN.
ResponseEntity getStaffDetails(Integer staffId) Retrieves detailed information for a specific staff member by ID, accessible only to users with ROLE_MANAGE.
Role-based access control enforced via @Secured annotations: read operations require ROLE_MANAGE, write operations (POST, PUT, DELETE) require ROLE_ADMIN Simple, low-complexity methods (loc=4-6, cyclomatic~=1) suggest delegation to service layer, typical for controller best practices

StaffMapper mapper
src/main/java/com/example/app/services/staff/domain/mapper/StaffMapper.java
package com.example.app.services.staff.domain.mapper
1 commit · last modified 2023-06-28
A MapStruct mapper component that converts between StaffEntity and StaffDto, handling bidirectional transformation with selective field mapping and relationship ignoring.
Depends on: GenericMapper StaffDto StaffEntity
MethodDescription
StaffDto mapToDto(StaffEntity entity) Description unavailable.
StaffEntity mapToEntity(StaffDto dto) Description unavailable.
MapStruct mapper with Spring component model integration for dependency injection Bidirectional mapping with explicit ignore directives on relationship fields to prevent circular references Nested property mapping (firstName/lastName to fullName.firstName/fullName.lastName) demonstrates complex structural transformation Expression-based mapping using LocalDateTime.now() for automatic timestamp management Staffid is intentionally ignored during DTO-to-Entity mapping to prevent external ID assignment

package com.example.app.services.staff.repository.custom
2 commits · last modified 2023-07-09
A repository implementation using JPA/QueryDSL for executing custom staff detail queries against the database.
Depends on: StaffDetailsDto
MethodDescription
List findAllStaffDetailsList() Overrides the interface method to return a list of all staff details using the underlying query mechanism.
Optional findStaffDetailsById(Integer staffId) Overrides the interface method to query and return staff details for a specific staff ID as an Optional.
JPAQuery findStaffDetail(Integer id) Constructs and returns a JPAQuery object for flexible staff detail retrieval by ID, allowing callers to refine or chain additional query criteria.
Uses @RequiredArgsConstructor for dependency injection, suggesting QueryDSL JPAQueryFactory is injected as a constructor parameter Separation of query building logic into findStaffDetail(Integer id) method promotes reusability between the two public query methods

MethodDescription
List getStaffList(Pageable pageable) Description unavailable.
Optional getStaff(Integer staffId) Description unavailable.
List getStaffDetailsList() Description unavailable.
Optional getStaffDetails(Integer staffId) Description unavailable.
StaffDto addStaff(StaffDto model) Description unavailable.
StaffDto updateStaff(Integer staffId, StaffDto model) Description unavailable.
void removeStaff(Integer staffId) Description unavailable.
Uses @Transactional(readOnly=true) for all query methods to optimize database access and prevent accidental mutations. Uses @Transactional() without readOnly flag for write operations (add, update, remove) to ensure ACID compliance. Annotated with @Service and @RequiredArgsConstructor for Spring dependency injection of repository/collaborator beans. getStaffDetails method shows elevated cyclomatic complexity (~2) suggesting conditional logic for detail enrichment or filtering.

ReportController controller
src/main/java/com/example/app/services/store/controller/ReportController.java
package com.example.app.services.store.controller
1 commit · last modified 2023-06-28
REST controller for generating and retrieving store sales reports, providing endpoints to view sales data by product categories and by individual stores.
GET /reports/sales/categories GET /reports/sales/stores
Depends on: CategorySalesDto CategorySalesRepresentationModelAssembler ReportService StoreSalesDto StoreSalesRepresentationModelAssembler UserRole
MethodDescription
ResponseEntity reportSalesByCategory() Retrieves a sales report aggregated by product categories, restricted to users with ROLE_MANAGE or higher privileges.
ResponseEntity reportSalesByStore() Retrieves a sales report aggregated by individual stores, restricted to users with ROLE_MANAGE or higher privileges.
All endpoints are secured with @Secured annotation using role-based access control Simple, low-complexity methods (cyclomatic~=1, loc=4) with straightforward reporting logic

11 methods · 4 notable View details →
StoreController controller
src/main/java/com/example/app/services/store/controller/StoreController.java
package com.example.app.services.store.controller
1 commit · last modified 2023-06-28
REST controller managing store entities and their associated staff, providing CRUD operations for stores and nested staff assignments with role-based access control.
GET /stores POST /stores GET /stores/{storeId} PUT /stores/{storeId} DELETE /stores/{storeId} GET /stores/{storeId}/staffs GET /stores/{storeId}/staffs/{staffId} POST /stores/{storeId}/staffs/{staffId} PUT /stores/{storeId}/staffs/{staffId} DELETE /stores/{storeId}/staffs/{staffId} GET /stores/{storeId}/details
Depends on: StaffDto StaffRepresentationModelAssembler StoreDetailsDto StoreDetailsRepresentationModelAssembler StoreDto StoreRepresentationModelAssembler StoreService UserRole
MethodDescription
ResponseEntity getStoreList(Pageable pageable) Retrieves a paginated list of all stores, restricted to users with ROLE_MANAGE or higher privileges.
ResponseEntity addStore(StoreDto model) Creates a new store record, restricted to users with ROLE_ADMIN privileges.
ResponseEntity getStore(Integer storeId) Retrieves details for a specific store by its ID, restricted to users with ROLE_MANAGE or higher privileges.
ResponseEntity updateStore(Integer storeId, StoreDto model) Updates an existing store's information by ID, restricted to users with ROLE_ADMIN privileges.
ResponseEntity deleteStore(Integer storeId) Deletes a store by its ID, restricted to users with ROLE_ADMIN privileges.
ResponseEntity getStoreStaffList(Integer storeId) Retrieves a list of all staff members assigned to a specific store, restricted to users with ROLE_MANAGE or higher privileges.
ResponseEntity getStoreStaff(Integer storeId, Integer staffId) Retrieves details for a specific staff member assigned to a store, restricted to users with ROLE_MANAGE or higher privileges.
ResponseEntity addStoreStaff(Integer storeId, Integer staffId) Assigns a staff member to a store by creating a store-staff relationship, restricted to users with ROLE_ADMIN privileges.
ResponseEntity updateStoreStaff(Integer storeId, Integer staffId) Updates an existing store-staff assignment relationship, restricted to users with ROLE_ADMIN privileges.
ResponseEntity deleteStoreStaff(Integer storeId, Integer staffId) Removes a staff member assignment from a store, restricted to users with ROLE_ADMIN privileges.
ResponseEntity getStoreDetails(Integer storeId) Retrieves comprehensive details for a specific store including related information, restricted to users with ROLE_MANAGE or higher privileges.
Hierarchical REST design with nested resources for staff management under stores (/stores/{storeId}/staffs) Consistent role-based security: read operations (GET) require ROLE_MANAGE, write operations (POST/PUT/DELETE) require ROLE_ADMIN Uses @RequiredArgsConstructor for dependency injection, indicating constructor-based field initialization All methods are low-complexity with cyclomatic complexity ~1 and minimal lines of code (4-7 loc)

package com.example.app.services.store.domain.mapper
1 commit · last modified 2023-06-28
MapStruct mapper for converting between InventoryEntity and InventoryDto, automatically injected as a Spring component for use in service layer data transformations.
Depends on: GenericMapper InventoryDto InventoryEntity
MethodDescription
InventoryDto mapToDto(InventoryEntity entity) Converts an InventoryEntity to its DTO representation, excluding relational mappings for filmByFilmId and storeByStoreId to prevent circular dependencies.
Ignores foreign key relationships (filmByFilmId, storeByStoreId) during mapping to avoid eager loading of related entities Uses MapStruct @Mapper with Spring component model for dependency injection

StoreMapper mapper
src/main/java/com/example/app/services/store/domain/mapper/StoreMapper.java
package com.example.app.services.store.domain.mapper
1 commit · last modified 2023-06-28
MapStruct mapper for converting between StoreDto and StoreEntity with automatic timestamp management, configured as a Spring component.
Depends on: GenericMapper StoreDto StoreEntity
MethodDescription
StoreEntity mapToEntity(StoreDto dto) Converts a StoreDto to a StoreEntity, auto-generating the lastUpdate timestamp and excluding relational fields for manager staff and address to prevent circular dependencies.
Uses expression-based mapping to inject the current LocalDateTime for the lastUpdate field, ensuring audit trail data is always current Ignores foreign key relationships (staffByManagerStaffId, addressByAddressId) to prevent eager loading Imports LocalDateTime for use in mapping expressions

package com.example.app.services.store.repository.custom
1 commit · last modified 2023-06-28
Interface defining custom repository methods for querying store details and staff information across multiple store-related entities.
Depends on: StaffDto StoreDetailsDto
MethodDescription
List findAllStoreDetailsList() Retrieves a list of all store details records from the data store.
Optional findStoreDetailsById(Integer storeId) Retrieves store details for a specific store identified by its ID, wrapped in an Optional for nullable handling.
List findAllStoreStaffList(Integer storeId) Retrieves a list of all staff members associated with a specific store.
Optional findStoreStaffById(Integer storeId, Integer staffId) Retrieves a specific staff member by their ID within a given store, wrapped in an Optional.

CustomStoreRepositoryImpl repository
src/main/java/com/example/app/services/store/repository/custom/CustomStoreRepositoryImpl.java
package com.example.app.services.store.repository.custom
1 commit · last modified 2023-06-28
Implementation of custom store repository providing query logic for store details and staff information, with constructor-based dependency injection and JPA query support.
Depends on: Country StaffDto StoreDetailsDto
MethodDescription
void replaceCountryIdToCountry(StoreDetailsDto result) Converts or replaces a country ID reference in a StoreDetailsDto object with the full country entity data.
List findAllStoreDetailsList() Executes a query to retrieve all store details records and returns them as a list.
Optional findStoreDetailsById(Integer storeId) Queries and retrieves store details for a specific store ID, returning an Optional wrapping the result.
JPAQuery findStoreDetail(Integer id) Constructs a complex JPA query to fetch a single store detail record by ID, with conditional join logic based on entity state.
List findAllStoreStaffList(Integer storeId) Executes a query to retrieve all staff members for a specific store and returns them as a list.
Optional findStoreStaffById(Integer storeId, Integer staffId) Queries and retrieves a specific staff member by both store and staff IDs, returning an Optional wrapping the result.
JPAQuery findStoreStaff(Integer storeId, Integer staffId) Constructs a JPA query to fetch a staff member record with conditional join logic based on store and staff identifiers.
Uses QueryDSL (JPAQuery) for building dynamic, type-safe queries with conditional joins. Implements data transformation logic in replaceCountryIdToCountry to enrich DTOs with related entity data. Query methods exhibit branching logic (cyclomatic complexity ~2) for handling different join conditions based on entity relationships.

StoreService service
src/main/java/com/example/app/services/store/service/StoreService.java
package com.example.app.services.store.service
1 commit · last modified 2023-06-28
Interface defining CRUD and query operations for store management, staff assignments, and inventory checks.
Depends on: InventoryDto StaffDto StoreDetailsDto StoreDto
MethodDescription
List getStoreList(Pageable pageable) Retrieves a paginated list of all stores.
Optional getStore(Integer storeId) Retrieves a single store by its identifier, returning an Optional to handle missing stores gracefully.
List getStoreDetailsList() Retrieves a comprehensive list of all stores with their detailed information.
Optional getStoreDetails(Integer storeId) Retrieves detailed information for a single store by identifier, returning an Optional.
List getStoreStaffList(Integer storeId) Retrieves a list of all staff members assigned to a specified store.
Optional getStoreStaff(Integer storeId, Integer staffId) Retrieves a specific staff member by store and staff identifiers, returning an Optional.
List checkInventoryStock(Integer storeId, Integer filmId) Checks and returns inventory stock information for a specified film at a given store.
StoreDto addStore(StoreDto model) Creates a new store with the provided store data and returns the created store as a DTO.
StaffDto addStoreStaff(Integer storeId, Integer staffId) Assigns an existing staff member to a store and returns the assignment details as a DTO.
StoreDto updateStore(Integer storeId, StoreDto model) Updates an existing store with new data and returns the updated store as a DTO.
StaffDto updateStoreStaff(Integer storeId, Integer staffId) Updates the assignment or details of a staff member at a specific store and returns the updated assignment.
void deleteStore(Integer storeId) Deletes a store and all its associated data.
void removeStoreStaff(Integer storeId, Integer staffId) Removes a staff member's assignment from a specific store.

A utility class providing static helper methods for constructing QueryDSL BooleanExpression filters with support for conditional, equality, range, and temporal comparisons.
9 methods · 3 notable View details →
ExpressionUtils other
src/main/java/com/example/app/common/util/ExpressionUtils.java
package com.example.app.common.util
1 commit · last modified 2023-07-09
A utility class providing static helper methods for constructing QueryDSL BooleanExpression filters with support for conditional, equality, range, and temporal comparisons.
MethodDescription
BooleanExpression filterExpression(boolean condition, BooleanExpression expression) Returns the provided expression if the condition is true, otherwise returns null to conditionally apply filters.
BooleanExpression equalExpression(U path, T value) Creates a BooleanExpression that tests equality between a generic path and a value.
BooleanExpression filterEquals(NumberExpression path, T value) Creates a BooleanExpression that tests equality between a numeric expression path and a value.
BooleanExpression filterEquals(NumberPath path, T value) Creates a BooleanExpression that tests equality between a numeric path and a value.
BooleanExpression filterEquals(EnumExpression path, T value) Creates a BooleanExpression that tests equality between an enum expression path and a value.
BooleanExpression filterEquals(EnumPath path, T value) Creates a BooleanExpression that tests equality between an enum path and a value.
BooleanExpression betweenExpression(ComparableExpression path, T start, T end) Creates a BooleanExpression that tests whether a comparable value falls within an inclusive range, with conditional logic handling for null boundaries.
BooleanExpression filterBetween(DateTimeExpression path, T start, T end) Creates a BooleanExpression that tests whether a datetime expression falls within a range.
BooleanExpression filterBetween(DateTimePath path, T start, T end) Creates a BooleanExpression that tests whether a datetime path falls within a range.
Private no-args constructor enforces utility class pattern, preventing instantiation. Heavy overloading of filterEquals and filterBetween methods to support multiple QueryDSL expression types (Expression vs. Path variants), suggesting a domain-specific query builder pattern. betweenExpression has elevated cyclomatic complexity (~5) indicating conditional logic for handling boundary conditions or null checks on range parameters.
